description:
I’m a software engineer focused on building tools that solve real problems for real people.
Recently, I built a YouTube analytics tool for a content creator and am now working on a pre-lab learning platform.

This site is a glimpse into how I think and what I build.
If you’re curious, try the chatbot in the corner.

Currently based in Korea — always open to a coffee chat.

socialLinks.label: YouTube
socialLinks.sub: My channel — thoughts on tech and life
